nasb.text: Now this was the lot for the tribe of Manasseh, for he was the firstborn of Joseph. To Machir the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead, were allotted Gilead and Bashan, because he was a man of war.

esv.text: Then allotment was made to the people of Manasseh, for he was the firstborn of Joseph. To Machir the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead, were allotted Gilead and Bashan, because he was a man of war.

cnv.text: 瑪拿西是約瑟的長子，他的支派抽籤所得的地業記在下面；至於瑪拿西的長子，基列的父親瑪吉，因為是個戰士，所以得到基列和巴珊。

ccb.text: 以下是约瑟的长子玛拿西支派分到的土地：玛拿西的长子、基列的父亲玛吉是个战士，因此分到了基列和巴珊两地。
